subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you again — it was nice connecting at the conference. I'd be glad to set up a formal meeting to explore how we might work together.

Here are some time slots that work well on our end:
- April 21, 2026 at 14:00–16:00
- April 22, 2026 at 14:00–16:00
- April 23, 2026 at 14:00–16:00

Let me know which one suits you best and I'll send a calendar invite.

As for your request for direct contact details (email and phone) for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share internal contact information. I'd recommend checking our public website for general team information, and I'd be happy to coordinate introductions to the right people after our initial meeting.

Looking forward to our conversation!

Best regards
